audit_items.proof_trace: The zero check at L174 (`if (usdPrice == 0) { revert Errors.ZeroFeedData(); }`) is placed sequentially after the full decimal scaling block (L167-172) and before storage (L178-179), with no bypass paths. All execution through the loop body is strictly sequential, so every scaled price — including values truncated to zero by division when feedDecimals > 18 — is caught before being stored.
